author: RamSet
releaseNotes: 1.0.0 - Initial release. Offline helper apps for the Ecobee HAP Thermostat (Local): a parent that hosts as many helpers as needed, plus three child types - Room Vent (proportional, sensor-driven vent control with an adjustable periodic re-evaluation and an airflow-safety minimum floor), Open-Contact Pause (pauses the entire HVAC while any monitored window/door is open, with minute-based delays and optional pause/resume notifications), and Humidity (runs a humidifier socket while the heater is on, up to a maximum desired humidity, with optional cold-weather frost control). No cloud. Requires the Ecobee HAP Thermostat (Local) driver.
tags: Thermostat, ecobee, Vents, Humidity, Contacts, Local, HAP

apps.name: Local Ecobee Helpers
apps.description: Parent app that hosts the Ecobee local helper child apps and holds the shared thermostat reference.

apps.name: Local Ecobee Room Vent
apps.description: Per-room vent control following the thermostat's heating/cooling state and setpoints, with an adjustable periodic re-evaluation and a minimum open floor.

apps.name: Local Ecobee Open-Contact Pause
apps.description: Pauses the entire HVAC while any monitored window/door contact is open, with minute-based delays and optional notifications.

apps.name: Local Ecobee Humidity
apps.description: Runs a humidifier switch/socket while the heater is on, up to a maximum desired humidity, with optional frost control.
